summary: Fee Engine + Checkout rework tested end-to-end. 15/15 backend pytest cases pass (admin fees CRUD + validations, /checkout/quote auth+flat+percent math, /checkout/init breakdown persistence in payment_transactions + vpp_participants, google_pay Stripe routing, open_banking mock_confirmation, disabled-method rejection). Frontend Checkout page renders all 6 lines correctly with live updates when switching payment methods. Admin Fees tab renders, persists changes (commission, flat/percent toggle, service_fee_value, recommended method) and verifies after reload. Fees reset to defaults at end so subsequent tests are not polluted.
critical_code_review_comments: Checkout.jsx (~220 lines), AdminPanel.jsx (534 lines) and server.py (2494 lines) – server.py is now well above 700-line threshold and should be split into routers (admin, checkout, auth, garages, etc.) for maintainability.

build_checkout_breakdown / compute_service_fee logic is duplicated implicitly between /checkout/quote and /checkout/init – good that it is one helper; ensure both endpoints continue to share it on future edits.
Admin Fees tab PUT request sends only changed keys – server merges correctly, but consider sending the entire validated config to avoid drift between client and persisted state.
Frontend reads session_token from localStorage; backend also accepts session_token cookie – ensure both are kept in sync on login/logout to prevent stale-auth bugs.

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Checkout 6-line breakdown + dynamic update + Recommended badge + Admin Fees tab persistence)

test_credentials: Founder admin: founder@thecollectivesavers.co.uk / SaversCollective. Consumer accounts seeded ad-hoc via mongosh during tests.
seed_data_creation: Each test creates a TEST_ prefixed VPP (force-locked) and a temp consumer user + session in MongoDB via mongosh. Fees reset to seeded defaults at end of run.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file: /app/backend/tests/test_fee_engine_checkout.py. Helpers _login_founder, _mongosh_seed_consumer, _create_locked_vpp, _force_lock, _reset_fees are reusable. Frontend testability: Checkout uses data-testid pm-<id> for each method card and summary-final-total / final-total. AdminPanel uses admin-tab-fees + fees-tab + fees-commission-input + fees-mode-flat/percent + fees-service-value-input + fees-method-<id> + fees-method-rec-<id> + fees-save-btn.
rca of the issue: N/A — no bugs found in fee-engine/checkout rework. Initial pytest run failed only because REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL was not set in shell env (fixed with explicit fallback). Mongosh JSON.stringify double-quoting issue was fixed by using print(JSON.stringify(...)) without --json=relaxed.
